input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.12.9.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.12.9.2
            TITLE: if a vehicle stalls, or ingests a cone, etc., it may be allowed to continue, subject to d.12.1.4

            CONTENT:
            rule D.12.9.2: If a vehicle stalls, or ingests a cone, etc., it may be allowed to continue, subject to D.12.1.4
D.12.9.2 If a vehicle stalls, or ingests a cone, etc., it may be allowed to continue, subject to D.12.1.4 
and D.12.4

final_answer: If a vehicle stalls, or ingests a cone, etc., it may be allowed to continue, subject to D.12.1.4
